name: No Ghost in Stay Home
developer: Midori Games / みどりげーむず
publisher: Midori Games / みどりげーむず
short_description: A dimly lit room, her first time stay home.... Do you gently watch over little Anna? Or....
detailed_description:
Anna is a little girl.
Only three hours, from 5:00 to 8:00 PM.
Tonight is the first time she has ever been to stay home.

Anna is very scared.
But she's fine.
There are no ghosts.
I promise you, there are no ghosts...

=====

This is a small click horror game.
You can touch the furniture in the room and use the items.

Within three minutes of playing, your actions will lead to various outcomes in Anna's room.
Will you watch over the girl, or...?

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean
